query: What is the most recent NIFC National Fire News year-to-date acres burned figure for 2026, latest available as of late June 2026? Report the exact YTD acres and date.
answer:
I've completed the research. 

**Answer:** The most recent NIFC National Fire News year-to-date acres burned figure for 2026 is **3,138,394 acres**, per the NIFC Statistics page last updated **Tuesday, June 30, 2026** (08:27). This figure reflects the underlying Incident Management Situation Report dated **Monday, June 29, 2026 – 0730 MDT**. Alongside it, NIFC reported 35,884 YTD wildfires and 474,026 acres burned on currently active large fires (54 uncontained large fires). The YTD acreage is a provisional, in-season running total updated Monday–Friday.

sources.title: Statistics | National Interagency Fire Center
sources.snippet: 35,884 Year-to-date Wildfires; 3,138,394 Acres Year-to-date Acres Burned; 474,026 Acres Burned on Large Fires; Last Updated: Tuesday, June 30, 2026 - 08:27

sources.title: National Fire News | National Interagency Fire Center
sources.snippet: June 30, 2026. Yesterday, 83 new fires were reported nationwide, including eight new large fires. Currently, firefighters are working to contain 54 uncontained large fires. Preparedness note as of June 29, 2026 at 7:30 a.m. MDT.

sources.title: Incident Management Situation Report Monday June 29, 2026 – 0730 MDT
